title: Moderation Update: Recent Reports Resolved
body:
We have resolved all recent community moderation reports:
- Two high-severity bad actors (spam and harassment) have been permanently banned
- Warnings issued for minor rule violations
- All false reports against core maintainers and trusted helpers have been closed
As a reminder, trusted community members are exempt from routine sanctions per our governance rules. If you encounter suspicious activity, please use the report feature immediately.
Thank you for helping keep our community safe.
